---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="project-card">
  <h2>Expense Analysis Dashboard</h2>
  <p>Developed a dashboard to analyze monthly operating costs and identify spending trends.</p>
  <p><strong>Tools:</strong> Excel, Power Query, Power BI</p>
  <p><strong>Result:</strong> Improved visibility into operating expenses and supported budgeting decisions.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <h2>Budget vs Actual Analysis</h2>
  <p>Analyzed budget versus actual performance to identify variances and provide financial insights.</p>
  <p><strong>Tools:</strong> Excel</p>
  <p><strong>Result:</strong> Supported financial planning and improved variance analysis.</p>
</div>
